videos.video_subject: Why Erling Haaland is a physical freak unlike any footballer ever - the hidden athletic stats that prove he is not human
videos.video_script: Erling Haaland is not human. At five years old, he set a world record in the standing long jump. He's six foot five, but he ran sixty metres in six point six four seconds, almost beating an Olympic sprinter. He doesn't even sleep like us. Twice a day, four hours each. And he's the fastest player in history to score fifty Premier League goals. This isn't a striker. It's a machine.
